# 00 — Company Bootstrap Prompt

<context-hint>
Use this first after copying the AI company kit into the repo.
</context-hint>

<task>
Initialize the NihonGo BJT AI Company operating model for this repository.
</task>

<instructions>
1. Read `.github/copilot-instructions.md`.
2. Read `protocols/compiled-protocols.md`.
3. Verify `docs/spec/nihongo_bjt_cursor_master_spec_final_completed_v2.md` exists.
4. Read `docs/spec/index.md`, `docs/spec/digests/boss_digest.md`, and `company/model-routing.md`.
5. Inspect the repository structure at a high level.
6. Update:
   - `company/PROJECT_STATE.md`
   - `company/COMPANY_BACKLOG.md`
   - `company/SPRINT_BOARD.md`
   - `company/DECISION_LOG.md`
   - `company/AGENT_HANDOFF.md`
7. Do not implement product code in this step.
8. Produce the first 5–10 prioritized tasks for making the partially completed product production-ready.
</instructions>

<acceptance-criteria>
- Company docs exist and reflect the current repo.
- Boss can run the next cycle.
- No source code changes unless necessary to add docs only.
</acceptance-criteria>

<report-contract>
Use compact YAML report from `protocols/compiled-protocols.md`.
</report-contract>
